manifest.name: Fateline Core
manifest.author: Fateline
manifest.description: The base game, shipped as a module. Defines the core stats and a starter set of life events across childhood, adolescence, and adulthood. Everything here uses the same public schema any community module uses (README §8).

events.title: You receive a job offer.

outcomes.resultText: The money is great, but the hours are brutal.
A comfortable balance of work and life.

events.title: You consider joining a gym.

outcomes.resultText: You feel stronger and healthier.
You pulled a muscle on day one and gave up.
Relaxing, if not exactly healthy.

events.title: You find an unexpected opportunity to invest.

outcomes.resultText: The investment paid off handsomely.
It was a scam. Your savings took a hit.
You kept your money where it was.

events.title: You took your first steps!

outcomes.resultText: Your family cheered. A good start to life.

events.title: There is a new playground in the neighborhood.

outcomes.resultText: You conquered the jungle gym. Exhilarating!
You fell and scraped your knee badly.
Gentle fun. You enjoyed the breeze.

events.title: The school library is having a reading challenge.

outcomes.resultText: You devoured the books and got smarter.
Recess was more your speed.

events.title: It’s Thanksgiving, and the family has gathered at your home.

outcomes.resultText: Second helpings of everything. A wonderful day.
You dodged the awkward questions, mostly.

events.title: It’s Thanksgiving, and everyone is looking to you to host.

outcomes.resultText: A warm, chaotic, wonderful family dinner.
The house felt a little empty.

events.title: Your mates are planning a gap year travelling Europe.

outcomes.resultText: You came back with stories and a broader mind.
Sensible. A little dull, but sensible.

events.title: Entrance-exam season has the whole country on edge.

outcomes.resultText: Grueling, but your scores soared.
You stayed sane and did respectably.

events.title: The streets light up for a major festival.

outcomes.resultText: Colour, food, and family — pure joy.

events.title: A friend pitches you a market stall partnership in Lagos.

outcomes.resultText: The stall thrived. Hard work paid off.
It didn’t pan out, but you learned a lot.
You kept your savings safe.

events.title: Carnival has taken over the city.

outcomes.resultText: Unforgettable. Your feet still ache.
You danced — and caught someone’s eye.

events.title: The years are catching up with you.

choices.text: Take it one day at a time

outcomes.resultText: You feel a little frailer than last year.
A rough year for your health.

events.title: You fall seriously ill.

choices.text: Fight it with everything you have

outcomes.resultText: You pulled through, weaker but unbowed.
The illness took a heavy toll.

events.title: You were born into a loving family.

outcomes.resultText: Your parents welcomed you to the world.

events.title: You hit it off with someone new.

outcomes.resultText: You made a new friend.
You stayed in your own lane.

events.title: A routine checkup turns up something concerning.

outcomes.resultText: You caught it early and recovered.
Treatment was harder than expected.
Putting it off made things worse.

events.title: You find yourself reflecting on the life you’ve built.

outcomes.resultText: You reinvented yourself and feel renewed.
The midlife crisis was expensive and a little embarrassing.
Gratitude settled your mind.

events.title: A background check resurfaces your record.

outcomes.resultText: Honesty earned you a second chance.
It cost you an opportunity.

events.title: Final exams are coming up.

outcomes.resultText: You aced your exams.
You studied hard but burned out a little.
Somehow you scraped by.
It went about as well as you would expect.

events.title: You have a crush on someone at school.

outcomes.resultText: They said yes! Your heart soared.
They turned you down. Ouch.
You never said anything. The moment passed.

events.title: A local shop is hiring part-time.

outcomes.resultText: You earned some money and a little independence.
You spent the summer relaxing.
You walked out with free goods.
Caught on camera. You now have a record.
You pulled off the heist of the decade.
The vault held longer than your luck. You were arrested.
You served your time and walked free.
Prison was rough this year.
A solid workout. You feel stronger.
You pulled a muscle.
You hit the books and got a little smarter.
You found a moment of calm.
A checkup and some care. Your health improved.
Honest work for honest pay.
You won big! Incredible luck.
No luck this time.
You had a great night out.
Fun night, rough morning.
A fresh look. You feel more confident.
Helping out left you fulfilled.
They appreciated the kind words.
It landed a little flat, but they smiled.
A pleasant time together. You both feel closer.
The argument left things tense.
You bickered, then let it go.
They said yes! A new chapter begins.
They turned you down. Awkward.
